creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
No idea what I was on about following devel/py-pyasn1-modules, tho, a patch will be required for that too. What I meant to say, that apparently the original author of pyasn1, Ilya Etingof (etingof@) has passed away[1]. The repo has been unmaintained since 2020, and the community around the project has forked[2] and is updating the codebase.

1: https://github.com/etingof/pyasn1/issues/217
2: https://github.com/pypi/support/issues/2090
